mdRecord.dcterms:title: Tom Sawyer by Richard Kinter
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Playbill for the play Tom Sawyer written and directed by Richard Kinter, based on The Adventures of Tom Sawyer by Mark Twain. Scenic Design by Christopher W. Carter. Costumes designed by Pamela Hale. Lighting Designed by Tony Partington. Stage Manager: Marjorie Terry.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Theater
Virginia
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
